narrative:
Gibsonburg B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 773 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
